Class Controller

boardifier.control.Controller
public abstract class Controller extends Object

    void
    endGame()
    Execute actions at the end of the game.

    Execute actions when the current player just ended its turn By default, this method does nothing because what to do is totally dependent of the game and its state.

  • Method Details

    • setFirstStageName

      public void setFirstStageName(String firstStageName)

    • startGame

      public void startGame() throws GameException
      Throws:
      GameException

    • stageLoop

      public abstract void stageLoop()
      defines what must be done during a stage

    • startStage

      protected void startStage(String stageName) throws GameException
      Start a stage of the game. This method MUST NOT BE called directly, except in the endStage() overridden method.*
      Parameters:
      stageName - The name of the stage, as registered in the StageFactory.
      Throws:
      GameException

    • stopStage

      public void stopStage()

    • endOfTurn

      public void endOfTurn()
      Execute actions when the current player just ended its turn By default, this method does nothing because what to do is totally dependent of the game and its state. For some, a new player can play, and for toehrs, the current player may play another turn.

    • endGame

      public void endGame()
      Execute actions at the end of the game. This method defines a default behaviour, which is to display a dialog box with the name of the winner and that proposes to start a new game or to quit.

    • update

      public void update()

    • getElementLook

      public ElementLook getElementLook(GameElement element)
      Get the look of a given element
      Parameters:
      element - the element for which the look is asked.
      Returns:
      an ElementLook object that is the look of the element

    • removeElementLookFromContainerLookCell

      public void removeElementLookFromContainerLookCell(ContainerElement container, ElementLook look, int row, int col)

    • putElementLookToContainerLookCell

      public void putElementLookToContainerLookCell(ContainerElement container, ElementLook look, int row, int col)

    • moveElementLookToContainerLookCell

      public void moveElementLookToContainerLookCell(GameElement element, ElementLook look, int rowSrc, int colSrc, int rowDest, int colDest)
